objective: Explore the codebase for the goal: Implement pi-pipeline extension FULLY. Read SPEC.md at /home/bom/source/my_pi/docs/extensions/pi-pipeline/SPEC.md. Create /home/bom/source/my_pi/pi-pipeline/ with ALL files. Plan mode (spec-driven, show-in-chunks, task decomposition), verification gates (5: tests, typecheck, lint, regression, evidence), intent clarification (ambiguity detection, structured questionnaire, Socratic interview), adaptive behavior (complexity detection, model selection). Anti-rationalization (12 excuses), fresh-context verification, TDD enforcement. Commands: /plan, /plan deepen, /plan go, /verify, /clarify, /go. Include unit tests.
branchPolicy: Use the assigned task worktree and avoid modifying the leader checkout.
commitPolicy: Do not commit unless explicitly requested by the user or workflow.
reportingContract: Report intended/changed files, verification evidence, blockers, conflict risks, and next recommended action.
escalationPolicy: Stop and report if scope is ambiguous, destructive action is needed, permissions are missing, verification cannot be completed, or edits may overlap with another worker/task.
constraints: Stay within the assigned task scope.
Do not claim completion without verification evidence.
Use mailbox/API state for coordination when available.
Do not make overlapping edits to the same file/symbol without explicit leader sequencing or ownership guidance.
